title: Graphic Design
description: A visual arts major centered on layout, typography, branding, illustration, and digital design tools.

title: Digital Media Production
description: Focuses on image creation, editing, storytelling, and visual composition across photography and digital media.

title: Film Studies
description: Examines film history, cinematography, script analysis, editing, and the language of moving images.

title: Art History
description: Studies major artistic movements, cultural contexts, visual analysis, and the development of art across eras.

title: Creative Writing
description: Builds skills in narrative craft, poetry, fiction, revision, and expressive writing across genres.

title: Animation
description: Covers movement, timing, visual storytelling, and digital techniques used in animation and motion graphics.

title: Music Production
description: Explores recording, mixing, composition, digital audio workflows, and sound design for creative projects.
